# CLI Reference

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED SECTION: cli-commands -->
<!-- This section is regenerated by scripts/sync-docs.js on every push to main. -->

All commands are run with `node src/cli.js <command> [options]`.
The package also exposes a `wp-optimizer` binary after `npm link` or global install.

---

## `test-connection`

Test the connection to the WordPress REST API using the configured credentials.

```bash
node src/cli.js test-connection
```

**Output:** Prints the connected user's name and email, or an error if the connection fails.

---

## `check-links`

Scan all published posts and pages for broken external links (HTTP 4xx/5xx or connection errors).

```bash
node src/cli.js check-links [options]
```

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `-c, --concurrency <n>` | `5` | Number of parallel link checks |
| `-o, --output <file>` | *(none)* | Save JSON report to this file |

**How it works:**
1. Fetches all published posts and pages via the WP REST API
2. Extracts every external `href` from the HTML content
3. Checks each unique URL with a HEAD request (falls back to GET if HEAD returns 405)
4. Reports broken URLs grouped by post/page

**Report schema** (when `--output` is used):

```json
{
  "summary": { "totalChecked": 120, "broken": 3, "timeouts": 1 },
  "brokenLinks": [
    {
      "post": { "id": 42, "title": "My Post", "url": "https://..." },
      "broken": [{ "url": "https://old.example.com/page", "status": 404 }]
    }
  ],
  "timeoutLinks": [ ... ]
}
```

---

## `audit-seo`

Score all published posts and pages on SEO quality (0–100) and list posts below a threshold.

```bash
node src/cli.js audit-seo [options]
```

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--min-score <n>` | `80` | Only show posts below this score |
| `--ai` | `false` | Add AI-powered suggestions via Claude (requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`) |
| `-o, --output <file>` | *(none)* | Save JSON report to this file |

**SEO Scoring Algorithm** (max 100 points, with Yoast bonus):

| Check | Points deducted |
|---|---|
| Missing title | −25 |
| Title too short (< 20 chars) | −10 |
| Title too long (> 60 chars) | −5 |
| No H1 heading | −20 |
| Multiple H1 headings | −10 |
| Content < 300 words | −25 |
| Content 300–599 words | −10 |
| No H2 for content > 600 words | −15 |
| Missing or empty excerpt | −15 |
| Keyphrase not in SEO title | −10 *(only if keyphrase set)* |
| Keyphrase not in meta description | −10 *(only if keyphrase set)* |
| Keyphrase not in first paragraph | −10 *(only if keyphrase set)* |
| Keyphrase density < 2 occurrences | −5 *(only if keyphrase set)* |
| Keyphrase not in subheadings | −5 *(only if keyphrase set)* |
| Brand name misspelled in title | −5 |
| Brand name misspelled in content | −5 |
| **Yoast bonus:** Good meta desc (50–140 chars) | +10 |
| **Yoast bonus:** Good SEO title (20–60 chars) | +5 |

The Yoast checks use `yoast_head_json` fields from the REST API (`og_title`, `og_description`).
The score is clamped between 0 and 100.

---

## `audit-media`

Check all images in the media library for quality issues.

```bash
node src/cli.js audit-media [options]
```

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--fix` | `false` | Auto-fix missing alt texts using the image title or filename |
| `-o, --output <file>` | *(none)* | Save JSON report to this file |

**Checks performed:**

| Issue | Condition |
|---|---|
| Missing alt text | `alt_text` is empty |
| Generic filename | Matches `img123`, `photo_01`, `dsc_456`, `screenshot7` etc. |
| Filename too short | Slug shorter than 5 characters |
| Large file size | File > 200 KB |
| High resolution | Width or height > 2560 px |

---

## `get-status`

Run all three audits in parallel and let Claude produce a concise site health report.

```bash
node src/cli.js get-status [options]
```

Requires `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`.

| Option | Default | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `-c, --concurrency <n>` | `5` | Concurrency for the link checker |

**How it works:**

1. Runs `auditSeo`, `checkLinks`, and `auditMedia` in parallel
2. Passes summarised results to Claude via tool use (`get_seo_status`, `get_link_status`, `get_media_status`)
3. Claude calls the tools as needed and returns a markdown health report

**Output format:**

```
🟢 Healthy  |  🟡 Needs Attention  |  🔴 Critical

Key metrics (SEO / links / media) + top 3 action items
```
